one_time_description: Settlement reached November 16, 2022 regarding litigation with former members of council; Band entitled to $3,475,431 compensation for damages, recoverability not yet known (subsequent event)
economic_notes: Band holds 25% in Pelltiq't Energy Group, 51% interest in Whispering Pines/A&T Limited Liability Partnership and Whispering Pines/Marwest Limited Liability Partnership (no active operations, excluded from consolidation). COVID-19 pandemic impacts noted. Rising interest rates and inflation noted due to 2022 world events. Band has variable rate debt at prime plus 1.5% (6.95%). Line of credit with BMO up to $100,000 fully unused.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED: three entities excluded from consolidation (25% Pelltiq't Energy Group, 51% Whispering Pines/A&T LLP, 51% Whispering Pines/Marwest LLP) as no active operations and no audited financials available. Social Housing consolidated as unincorporated entity. No budget presented as Band does not prepare one. Subsequent event: $3,475,431 litigation settlement receivable with uncertain recoverability. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($1,352,870) + CMHC ($11,930) + FNEC ($1,939) + FNHA ($160,275) + Province of BC ($361,278) = $1,888,292 (note: FNEC and FNHA included as government transfers). osr calculated as total revenue minus total_government_transfers. expenses_housing combines band-owned housing ($69,603) and social housing ($19,001). Honorarium of $195,962 noted in expenses by object but no formal remuneration schedule provided. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024; audit report dated November 8, 2023 indicating significant delay in audit completion.
